feedback.text: I believe that the current climate of game companies holding complete jurisdiction over the lifespan of their products - on top of the mere concept of their products lifespan in and of itself - is unacceptable. As consumers, we deserve the right to have full ownership and freedom over the products we purchase, including video games. Speaking from personal experience, I have bought several games for which my access has been revoked due to the servers being permanently disabled, through no personal fault of my own. I believe that this must change, which is why I request that this issue is considered alongside the existing five issues covered in the Digital Fairness Act.
